header.description: Interact with Microsoft Entra ID API

get.description: Retrieve data for a specific user

displayName.description: The name to display in the address book for the user

mailNickname.description: The mail alias for the user

options.description: Lets you add specific users as members of a group and have unique permissions

DynamicMembership.description: Lets you use rules to automatically add and remove users as members

securityEnabled.description: Whether the group is a security group

isAssignableToRole.description: Whether Microsoft Entra roles can be assigned to the group

membershipRuleProcessingState.description: Indicates whether the dynamic membership processing is on or paused

preferredDataLocation.description: A property set for the group that Office 365 services use to provision the corresponding data-at-rest resources (mailbox, OneDrive, groups sites, and so on)

uniqueName.description: The unique identifier for the group, can only be updated if null, and is immutable once set

visibility.description: Specifies the visibility of the group

aboutMe.description: A freeform text entry field for the user to describe themselves

ageGroup.description: Sets the age group of the user

businessPhones.description: The telephone number for the user

city.description: The city in which the user is located

companyName.description: The name of the company associated with the user

consentProvidedForMinor.description: Specifies if consent is provided for minors

department.description: The department name where the user works

employeeId.description: Employee identifier assigned by the organization

employeeHireDate.description: The hire date of the user

employeeLeaveDateTime.description: The date and time when the user left or will leave the organization

employeeOrgData.description: Represents organization data (for example, division and costCenter) associated with a user

costCenter.description: The cost center associated with the user

division.description: The name of the division in which the user works

costCenter.description: The cost center associated with the user

division.description: The name of the division in which the user works

givenName.description: The given name (first name) of the user

forceChangePassword.description: Whether the user must change their password on the next sign-in

interests.description: A list for the user to describe their interests

mail.description: The SMTP address for the user

mobilePhone.description: The primary cellular telephone number for the user

mySite.description: The URL for the user's personal site

officeLocation.description: The office location for the user

onPremisesImmutableId.description: This property is used to associate an on-premises Active Directory user account to their Microsoft Entra user object

otherMails.description: Additional email addresses for the user

pastProjects.description: A list of past projects the user has worked on

postalCode.description: The postal code for the user's address

preferredLanguage.description: User's preferred language in ISO 639-1 code

responsibilities.description: A list of responsibilities the user has

schools.description: A list of schools the user attended

skills.description: A list of skills the user possesses

state.description: The state or province of the user's address

streetAddress.description: The street address of the user's place of business

usageLocation.description: Two-letter country code where the user is located

fields.description: The fields to add to the output

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

allowExternalSenders.description: Whether people external to the organization can send messages to the group. Wait a few seconds before editing this field in a newly created group.

autoSubscribeNewMembers.description: Whether new members added to the group will be auto-subscribed to receive email notifications. Wait a few seconds before editing this field in a newly created group.

password.description: The password for the user. The password must satisfy minimum requirements as specified by the passwordPolicies property.

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

allowUnauthorizedCerts.description: Whether to accept the response even if SSL certificate validation is not possible

proxy.description: HTTP proxy to use. If authentication is required it can be defined as follow: http://username:password@myproxy:3128

timeout.description: Time in ms to wait for the server to send response headers (and start the response body) before aborting the request
